LanguageData.DMSE.MissileBase.RelocatedDesc: An enemy missile launch position has completed its strike mission and relocated to avoid counteraction.
LanguageData.DMSE.MissileBase.DestroyedDesc: Your colonists have destroyed all radars and launch facilities at the enemy missile position. The missile threat from this position has been neutralized.
LanguageData.DMSE.MissileBase.ShuttleBlocked: This area is within {0} tiles of an enemy missile position's anti-air denial zone. Shuttle takeoff and landing are not possible here.
LanguageData.DMSE.MissileBase.ArrivedLetter: Your pawns have arrived at a missile launch position. The enemy has deployed fire control radars and launch vehicles here, continuously striking nearby colonies. Destroying all radars will neutralize their strike capability.
LanguageData.DMSE.MissileBase.SiteDesc: A mobile tactical ballistic missile launch position equipped with fire control radar and missile launchers. The position will relocate after completing its mission.
LanguageData.ScorerLaunchDesc: Launches the loaded tactical missile. The missile will be able to strike targets outside the large map at long range and retain map visibility for 3 days to assess the strike's effectiveness. Re-launching resets this time.
LanguageData.DMSE.Letter.HuntdownThreat.Label: Huntdown
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.HuntdownThreat.Desc: military police of colonial fleet are searching the signal of missing Stele, it is only a matter of time they find you and send a hunting squad.
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.HuntdownThreatCritical.Desc: the position of Stele has been tracked down, hunting squad and possible air strike will arrive in no time, transfer before it's too late.
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.BVRStatus.Label: BVR System
LanguageData.DMSE.Cannot.Reason.NotInSpace: Cannot transfer: must be in space.
LanguageData.DMSE.Cannot.Reason.NoFusionCore: Cannot transfer: no Fusion core connected.
LanguageData.DMSE.Disabled.TargetedSurface: Cannot transfer: destination must be in space.
LanguageData.DMSE.Flight.Select.Desc: A valid flight module is installed on this ship. Please choose a flight mode:
LanguageData.DMSE.Flight.Impact.Header: Your colonists know this is a real option, but not a wise one.
LanguageData.DMSE.Flight.Impact.Confirm:
Even while the navigation console flashes crimson warnings, it still shows a feasible acceleration profile.

By activating the hard impact protocol, the fusion core will output full power under overload conditions, allowing the nuclear-thermal engines to accelerate this ship toward the planet at maximum thrust and collide with the surface.

This will turn both the ship and its momentum into an effective high-yield kinetic weapon, causing irreversible damage to the planet.



Are you sure you want to proceed?
LanguageData.DMSE_ShipWarmUpBegin: Fusion core heating up. Launching procedure in 6...
LanguageData.DMSE.Impact.Ending.Intro: The gravship streaked across the sky with a blazing trail, carrying immense mass into the ground. The horizon turned to light, and violent shockwaves followed, becoming storms and earthquakes that swept across the planet's surface. In a short span, countless lives and landscapes were erased in this world-shattering impact.
LanguageData.DMSE.Impact.Ending.Outro: Fortunately, this was not the maximum output the nuclear-thermal engines could produce. After the disaster subsided, most people on the surface survived. Whatever the purpose behind it, this impact will be remembered forever in the history of this world.
LanguageData.DMSE.Impact.Ending.Aboard: We may never know whether the crew aboard the gravship escaped at the last moment, or vanished entirely in the impact.
LanguageData.DMSE.Impact.Ending.FleetFailed.Intro: The gravship streaked across the sky with a blazing trail, carrying immense mass into the ground. The horizon turned to light, and violent shockwaves followed, becoming storms and earthquakes that swept across the planet's surface. In a short span, countless lives and landscapes were erased in this world-shattering impact.
LanguageData.DMSE.Impact.Ending.FleetFailed.Outro: After assessing the damage, colonial fleet command could only evacuate surface survivors. The projected terraforming cost forced the fleet to abandon development of this planet. Whatever the purpose behind it, both the fleet and this world will remember this impact forever.
LanguageData.DMSE.Impact.Planetkiller.Ending.Intro: The gravship cut across the sky, every thermonuclear engine roaring with overwhelming thrust, before driving its colossal mass into the ground. A wall of rising crust surged along the horizon, and the following superheated shockwave became a sea of fire that swept across the planet's surface.
LanguageData.DMSE.Impact.Planetkiller.Ending.Outro: This was heavenly fire, a supreme judgment said in sacred texts to belong only to gods.\n\nWhatever the purpose behind it, this world may not recover life for a hundred years.
LanguageData.DMSE.Impact.Planetkiller.Ending.Aboard: No one could survive a cataclysm of this scale.
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.Exist.IsMissileBase: This is an active missile launch position. Ending observation early will allow the crew to regroup and reset their defenses.
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.Exist.EndEarly.Confirm: End observation now? The map will no longer be held open and may be cleaned up by the game.
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.Exist.EndEarly.Confirm.Missil:
End observation early?

The enemy crew will have the opportunity to regroup — the launch position's defenses and timers will reset, as if the observation never happened.

This cannot be undone.
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.Exist.ObservationEnded: Observation ended early. Enemy forces may regroup.
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.PlayerMissiles.Label: {0} missiles outbound — first impact in {1}
LanguageData.DMSE.Alert.PlayerMissiles.ClickHint: Left-click to cycle to next impact site. Right-click to cycle back.
LanguageData.DMSE.Missile.OutOfRange: Target is beyond missile range ({0} tiles).
LanguageData.DMSE.Missile.ReadyToAssemble: Resources ready — confirm to begin assembly
LanguageData.DMSE.Missile.AssemblyQueued: Assembly queued — colonists will begin shortly
LanguageData.DMSE.Missile.NoRackAvailable: No missile rack with compatible missiles found
LanguageData.DMSE.Missile.IncomingLetterDesc: A missile launched by {0} is inbound and will strike the colony shortly.
LanguageData.DMSE_MissileDecayedAway: {0} has degraded beyond use and fallen apart.
LanguageData.DMSE.Ballistic.FireDesc: Launch the assembled ballistic missile at a world-map target. The missile follows a lofted trajectory and is nearly impossible to intercept once launched.
LanguageData.DMSE.Ballistic.NotLoaded: Missile not assembled. Configure warhead, guidance, and payload in the Assembly tab, then wait for colonists to deliver materials and complete assembly.
LanguageData.DMSE.Ballistic.AwaitingAssembly: Ballistic missile: awaiting assembly by colonists
LanguageData.DMSE.Ballistic.Unloaded: Ballistic missile silo: unloaded — configure in Assembly tab
